svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="nSY0uvTpcL38dPr9l24d" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1915" dy="1135" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam linetype ortho

' =======================
' Presentation Layer
' =======================
package \"presentation\" {
 class ConsoleUI {
 - productService: ProductService
 - materialService: MaterialService
 - scanner: Scanner
 + start(): void
 - displayMenu(): void
 - getChoice(): String
 - printOutput(message: String): void
 - readString(prompt: String): String
 - readInt(prompt: String): int
 - readDouble(prompt: String): double
 }
}

' =======================
' Application Layer
' =======================
package \"application\" {
 class ProductService {
 - strategies: List<ImpactCalculationStrategy>
 - repository: ProductRepository
 - selector: GuidanceSelector
 - materialService: MaterialService
 + ProductService(strategies: List<ImpactCalculationStrategy>, repository: ProductRepository, selector: GuidanceSelector)
 + createProduct(name: String, category: Category, lifespan: Lifespan, materialNames: List<String>, quantities: List<Double>): void
 + getAllProducts(): List<Product>
 + findProductByName(name: String): Product
 + calculateImpact(productName: String, choice: int): double
 + getRecyclingGuidance(productName: String): String
 }

 class MaterialService {
 - repository: MaterialRepository
 + MaterialService(repository: MaterialRepository)
 + createMaterial(name: String, impactValue: double, category: RecyclingCategory): void
 + getAllMaterials(): List<Material>
 + findMaterialByName(name: String): Material
 }
}

' =======================
' Domain Layer
' =======================
package \"domain\" {
 
 ' Core Entities
 class Product {
 - name: String
 - category: Category
 - lifespan: Lifespan
 - compositions: List<MaterialComposition>
 + getName(): String
 + getCompositions(): List<MaterialComposition>
 }

 class Material {
 - name: String
 - baseImpactValue: double
 - recyclingCategory: RecyclingCategory
 + getName(): String
 + getBaseImpact(): double
 + getRecyclingCategory(): RecyclingCategory
 }

 class MaterialComposition {
 - quantity: double
 - material: Material
 + getQuantity(): double
 + getMaterial(): Material
 + getCategory(): RecyclingCategory
 }

 class GuidanceSelector {
 - implementables: List<RecyclingGuide>
 + GuidanceSelector(implementables: List<RecyclingGuide>)
 + select(materials: List<Material>): RecyclingGuide
 }

 ' Value Objects / Enums
 enum Category {
 ELECTRONICS
 HOUSEHOLD
 PACKAGING
 }

 class Lifespan {
 - years: int
 + getYears(): int
 }

 enum RecyclingCategory {
 RECYCLABLE
 COMPOSTABLE
 HAZARDOUS
 LANDFILL
 }

 ' Strategy Interface
 interface ImpactCalculationStrategy {
 + calculateImpact(product: Product): double
 }

 class SimpleImpactStrategy {
 + calculateImpact(product: Product): double
 }

 class WeightedImpactStrategy {
 + calculateImpact(product: Product): double
 }

 ' Guidance Interface
 interface RecyclingGuide {
 + supports(materials: List<Material>): boolean
 + getGuidance(materials: List<Material>): String
 }

 class RecyclableGuidance {
 + supports(materials: List<Material>): boolean
 + getGuidance(materials: List<Material>): String
 }

 class CompostableGuidance {
 + supports(materials: List<Material>): boolean
 + getGuidance(materials: List<Material>): String
 }

 class HazardousGuidance {
 + supports(materials: List<Material>): boolean
 + getGuidance(materials: List<Material>): String
 }

 class LandfillableGuidance {
 + supports(materials: List<Material>): boolean
 + getGuidance(materials: List<Material>): String
 }

 class MixedMaterialGuidance {
 + supports(materials: List<Material>): boolean
 + getGuidance(materials: List<Material>): String
 }

 ' Repository Interfaces
 interface ProductRepository {
 + save(product: Product): void
 + findAll(): List<Product>
 + findByName(name: String): Product
 }

 interface MaterialRepository {
 + save(material: Material): void
 + findAll(): List<Material>
 + findByName(name: String): Material
 }
}

' =======================
' Infrastructure Layer
' =======================
package \"infrastructure\" {
 class InMemoryProductRepository {
 - products: List<Product>
 + save(product: Product): void
 + findAll(): List<Product>
 + findByName(name: String): Product
 }

 class InMemoryMaterialRepository {
 - materials: List<Material>
 + save(material: Material): void
 + findAll(): List<Material>
 + findByName(name: String): Material
 }
}

' =======================
' Relationships
' =======================

' Presentation -> Application
ConsoleUI --> ProductService
ConsoleUI --> MaterialService

' Application -> Application
ProductService --> MaterialService

' Application -> Domain
ProductService --> Product
ProductService --> ImpactCalculationStrategy
ProductService --> ProductRepository
ProductService --> GuidanceSelector

MaterialService --> Material
MaterialService --> MaterialRepository

' Strategy Implementations
ImpactCalculationStrategy <|.. SimpleImpactStrategy
ImpactCalculationStrategy <|.. WeightedImpactStrategy

' Guidance Implementations
RecyclingGuide <|.. RecyclableGuidance
RecyclingGuide <|.. CompostableGuidance
RecyclingGuide <|.. HazardousGuidance
RecyclingGuide <|.. LandfillableGuidance
RecyclingGuide <|.. MixedMaterialGuidance
RecyclingGuide --> Material

GuidanceSelector --> RecyclingGuide
GuidanceSelector --> Material

' Repository Implementations
ProductRepository <|.. InMemoryProductRepository
MaterialRepository <|.. InMemoryMaterialRepository

' Domain Structure
Product \"1\" *-- \"1\" Category
Product \"1\" *-- \"1\" Lifespan
Product \"1\" *-- \"1..*\" MaterialComposition
MaterialComposition \"*\" --> \"1\" Material
Material \"*\" --> \"1\" RecyclingCategory

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="NRXdvPMLcOgYXf6TWXiO-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1474" width="2887" x="160" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 2887px; height: 1474px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;

g.text: ProductService(strategies: List<ImpactCalculationStrategy>, repository: ProductRepository, selector: GuidanceSelector)
createProduct(name: String, category: Category, lifespan: Lifespan, materialNames: List<String>, quantities: List<Double>): void
createMaterial(name: String, impactValue: double, category: RecyclingCategory): void
